output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P1263 wd:Q958369 ; wdt:P585 ?year ; rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , 'nab cup') && LANG(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER(?year >= 1988 && ?year <= 2013)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
